author: codex-agent

patch.value:
Implementation direction:
- Extend PmSettings with agent_guidance state and defaults in src/types.ts and src/core/shared/constants.ts.
- Extend settings schema, merge, and serialize ordering in src/core/store/settings.ts; keep output deterministic.
- Add init option wiring in src/cli/register-setup.ts and action schema optional keys in src/sdk/cli-contracts.ts.
- Update help text in src/cli/help-content.ts and JSON/help payload expectations so agents discover the later-add path.
- Consider a read/reset config key only if implementation needs an operator escape hatch beyond pm init --agent-guidance add/skip/status. If added, keep scope project-only and document clear behavior.
- Keep MCP pm_run init schema in sync through SDK contracts so connected agents can request guidance add/status without shell-specific assumptions.
Expose agent guidance init option in settings, contracts, help, and config
Make the new pm init agent-guidance behavior discoverable and machine-safe across settings schema/types, runtime help, SDK contracts, MCP action schema, and optional config inspection.

settings schema accepts and persists agent_guidance deterministically; pm init help and JSON help include the guidance option; pm contracts --command init --flags-only and action schema expose the option; MCP schema can pass the option; config/docs give a clear operator path to inspect or reset declined state if implemented.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Child task created from pm-7t04. This slice makes the UX contract visible to humans and agents after prompt behavior exists.

message: Create child task for contracts help and settings surfaces

value.note: MCP pm_run init schema uses contracts
init action schema and flag contracts
config regression if key is added
